rag_rules: AGREE annex blocks must be placed in component implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
generic_rules: Preserve component type scope when writing guarantees that relate visible inputs to outputs
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for constants and equations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be syntactically enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
anti_patterns: Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes for guarantees
